insight.headline: Deprecating useBuyerJourneyIntercept
insight.what_changed: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated starting in version 2026-07. The block_progress capability it depends on is also deprecated. Existing extensions will continue to work on older versions but should be updated to ensure compatibility with future versions.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should review their checkout UI extensions and update them to remove the useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook and block_progress capability. They should also test their extensions with the latest API version to ensure compatibility. The deprecation does not affect existing extensions immediately, but it's essential to update them to avoid breaking changes in the future. Developers can use alternative APIs or hooks to achieve similar functionality.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may not notice immediate changes, but they will benefit from updated extensions that provide a better checkout experience. Merchants should work with their developers to ensure their extensions are updated and compatible with the latest API versions.
insight.why_it_matters: The deprecation of useBuyerJourneyIntercept is significant because it affects how checkout UI extensions interact with the buyer's journey. Developers must update their extensions to ensure they continue to work correctly and provide a seamless experience for merchants and their customers.

also_worth_knowing.text: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now allows server-side code to handle breaking changes to action configurations, reducing validation failures. This change gives developers more control over workflow validation.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now automatically updates action runtime URLs on every execution, ensuring that existing workflows use the latest URL after app redeployment.
CLI version 4.4.0 includes updates to Javy dependencies, validation for GCS bundle uploads, and fixes for long URL wrapping in banners and alerts.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: The Shopify App Store requirements policy 1.3 now clarifies the use of honest and transparent review practices for all published apps.

updates.title: Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10
updates.summary: The Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and related Checkout types are removed in Customer Account API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing for sub-region markets in the Admin GraphQL API 2026-07.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill, starting in API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Deprecating the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions
updates.summary: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated, starting in version 2026-07, and will be replaced by alternative solutions.

updates.title: Shop Minis May June 2026 update
updates.summary: The Shop Minis May June 2026 update introduces new features, including typed product variant intent hooks for selecting variants and adding to cart.

updates.title: Market-driven shipping now available in feature preview
updates.summary: Market-driven shipping is now available in feature preview, allowing merchants to attach shipping options directly to each market and vary rates by product.

updates.title: @shopify/mini-oxygen@4.2.0
updates.summary: @shopify/mini-oxygen version 4.2.0 includes minor changes, such as making the Oxygen Vite plugin self-sufficient and inferring compatibility dates.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.0
updates.summary: @shopify/cli-hydrogen version 13.0.0 includes patch changes, such as adding deploy flags and environment variables for configuring Oxygen's client assets directory and worker directory.

recap.headline: Shopify updates GraphQL Admin API, deprecates fields, and introduces market-driven shipping

themes.title: API Updates
themes.detail: The GraphQL Admin API has been updated with new fields such as `lineItem` on the `GiftCard` object, `legalEntityId` on the `BusinessEntity` type, and `discountApplications` on the `DraftOrder` object. Additionally, the `discountedUnitPrice` field on the `DraftOrderLineItem` object has been deprecated in favor of `approximateDiscountedUnitPrice`.

themes.title: Deprecations and Removals
themes.detail: The `Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout` field and the `Checkout` type subtree have been removed in the Customer Account API version 2026-10. The `useBuyerJourneyIntercept` API on checkout UI extensions has been deprecated, and the `isCumulative` argument to the `marketingEngagementCreate` mutation is being deprecated.

themes.title: New Features and Previews
themes.detail: Market-driven shipping is now available in feature preview, allowing merchants to configure shipping directly on a market. The Shop Minis update includes new features such as product variant intents, and Hydrogen has been updated with new versions of `@shopify/mini-oxygen` and `@shopify/cli-hydrogen`.

actions.text: Update API integrations to use new fields and deprecate removed fields
Test market-driven shipping in feature preview
Review and update code to comply with updated App Store requirements
